title: Talking About Numbers 谈论数字
scene: 两个同学讨论电话号码、年龄、价格等数字。

lines.en: Hey Lily, do you know the new phone number for the library?
lines.zh: 嘿Lily，你知道图书馆的新电话号码吗？

lines.en: Let me check. Yes, it is 8-7-6-5-4-3-2-1.
That is easy to remember. How old is your brother now?
lines.zh: 这个很好记。你弟弟现在多大了？

lines.en: He is twelve years old this year. He is two years younger than me.
lines.zh: 他今年十二岁了。他比我小两岁。

lines.en: I see. By the way, how much is the new storybook you bought?
lines.zh: 原来如此。对了，你买的那本新故事书多少钱？

lines.en: It was twenty-five yuan. But I got a five-yuan discount.
lines.zh: 原价二十五元。但是我打了五块钱的折。

lines.en: So you only paid twenty yuan. That is a good price!
lines.zh: 所以你只花了二十元。价格真不错！

lines.en: Yes, I like it a lot. My student number is fourteen by the way.
lines.zh: 是的，我非常喜欢。顺便说一下，我的学号是十四号。

lines.en: Mine is twenty-three. We are not in the same class group.
lines.zh: 我的是二十三号。我们不在同一个小组。
